definition: Sum of (quantity * unit_price) for non-cancelled orders
formula_notes: revenue = SUMX(order_lines, quantity * unit_price) where is_cancelled=0
acceptance_check: Compare PBI Revenue vs SQL Revenue for same date range; diff <= 0.1%

definition: Sum of (quantity * unit_cost) for non-cancelled orders
formula_notes: cogs = SUMX(order_lines, quantity * unit_cost) where is_cancelled=0
acceptance_check: Compare PBI COGS vs SQL COGS; diff <= 0.1%
PBI GM equals PBI Revenue - PBI COGS
PBI Orders equals SQL Orders for same filters

definition: Share of orders shipped on/before target date
acceptance_check: PBI On-time Ship Rate within 0.5% of SQL calc

definition: Average days from order_date to delivery_date
formula_notes: cycle = AVG(DATEDIFF(order_date, delivery_date)) exclude cancelled, require delivery_date
acceptance_check: PBI cycle time within 0.2 days of SQL calc
